title: Article
description: Represents a knowledge base article from a connected platform (Confluence, Notion, etc.) via the Merge Knowledge Base Unified API.

remote_id.description: The third-party ID of this article.

content.description: Article body content, typically Markdown or HTML.

container.description: The Merge ID of the parent container (space/page).

author.description: The Merge ID of the article author.

url.description: Canonical URL on the source platform.

permissions.description: ACL entries (users or groups) with permission level.

remote_was_deleted.description: Whether the record was deleted upstream.
